Create automatic terrain designations for this tower.
Scan and place mining designations in this tower's area.
Designate all debris in the area for mining/removal. Overrides any forestry designations.
Clear all terrain designations in this tower's area.
Width of generated access ramps (0 = disable ramp).
Maximum layers to excavate from the surface. (u221e = no limit.)

How strictly the scan filters for ore quality.
Off: include all tiles, dig to full depth.
Low: exclude very sparse tiles, trim thin trailing ore at the bottom.
Med: moderate quality u2014 skip tiles with heavy overburden or little ore.
High: only rich tiles with a clean ore column.
Max: near-pure ore only u2014 strict on overburden, depth and ore density.

Minimum corridor width for connecting ore regions and enforcing passability.
0 = disabled (regions left separate, no corridors or hole-filling).
1 = 1-tile corridors (small and medium vehicles).
2 = 2-tile corridors (mega vehicles).
Force the scan to target a specific product. None = useful products first, then debris, then dirt.

When enabled, ATD may select and place experimental V1 turning or switchback accessways using vanilla flat and slope designations. Requires the tower's ramp width to be set to 1. Corridor clearance is independent. Wider ramps and corner or saddle designations are not included.
Use A* instead of reference Dijkstra for experimental accessway dry runs. Dijkstra is the safer validation baseline.
Tile-distance cost assigned to one unit of center-height terrain work. Range: 0-100; default: 1.
Horizontal exclusion distance per vertical terrain level. 1 is a 45-degree slope; higher values widen the exclusion hourglass, while lower values narrow it. Range: 0.05-2; default: 1.
Maximum allowed height difference between adjacent designation corners. Range: 1-3.
Bottom-flattening strength from 0 to 10. 0 disables the bottom-flattening pass.
Designations placed per coroutine frame while the game is unpaused. Range: 1-200.
Whether the Mining designations panel starts collapsed by default.
Whether the Ore composition panel starts collapsed by default.
Whether the Farmland preparation panel starts collapsed by default.
Whether ATD shows a green notification when any vehicle depot completes an excavator.
Whether ATD shows ramp access warning notifications on mine towers.
Minimum ore thickness in terrain tiles for this quality level.
Minimum ore density from the previous ore bottom to this ore bottom. Clamped from 0 to 1.
Minimum ore-to-column ratio for this quality level. Clamped from 0 to 1.
Minimum connected designation tile count for a cluster to survive the isolation filter.
Key used to enter and toggle corner designation mode while a terrain designation tool is active.
Use a single key such as K, 1, F1, Space, or Escape.
Save these settings to ATDsettings.json. They will be used as the defaults for all new games.
Restore the global mod defaults for all settings. (Does not automatically save them as config.)
Ore resources within this tower's current mining designations. (Does not account for potential landslides.)
Press u21ba to scan ore composition.
Tower mining priority set to {0}. Click to unset.
Automates the preparation and final filling of flat level designations so their top layer becomes farmable.
Prepare flat level designations for farmland by clearing unsuitable top material, then restoring the final fill orders.

Automatically unassign excavators from this tower when no designation has pending excavation work, or while the tower is paused.
Excavators are tracked and re-assigned when excavation work returns.

Automatically unassign trucks from this tower when no designation has pending excavation work, or while the tower is paused.
Trucks are tracked and re-assigned when excavation work returns.
[ATD] {entity} could not start an access ramp
[ATD] {entity} could not fit a full access ramp
[ATD] {entity} could not path to the ramp
